ohtani.title: Max Muncy hits game-winning homer in Dodgers’ win
ohtani.blurb: Max Muncy’s late two-run homer and Roki Sasaki’s solid start propel the Dodgers in their 2-1 win over the Yankees

imanaga.title: Greene, De La Cruz propel Reds to 4-0 victory
imanaga.blurb: A dozen strikeouts from Hunter Greene, and a two-hit day for Elly De La Cruz lead the Reds to a 4-0 shutout win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Ryan Jeffers hits a three-run home run in Twins' win
suzuki.blurb: Ryan Jeffers hits his eighth homer of the season and Bailey Ober strikes out seven in the Twins' 5-2 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Wilyer Abreu hits two home runs in Red Sox's 5-3 win
yoshida.blurb: Wilyer Abreu belts two home runs and Willson Contreras adds one of his own to propel the Red Sox to a 5-3 win over the Rays

okamoto.title: Montgomery, Antonacci lead White Sox to 12-4 win
okamoto.blurb: Colson Montgomery hits a bases-clearing double and Sam Antonacci crushes a two-run home run to give the White Sox a win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Montgomery, Antonacci lead White Sox to 12-4 win
murakami.blurb: Colson Montgomery hits a bases-clearing double and Sam Antonacci crushes a two-run home run to give the White Sox a win over the Blue Jays

matsui.title: Ty France's home run propels Padres to one-run win
matsui.blurb: Ty France delivers a go-ahead home run to power the Padres to an 8-7 win over the Blue Jays
